title: Tropical Cyclone Narelle Approaches Queensland Coast As Category 5 Storm | 10 News
description: It's the most powerful storm to menace far north Queensland in a century.  Cyclone Narelle has strengthened to a category 5 and its destructive core is expected to strike the coast tomorrow.  For those in the path preparations have been made and evacuations are complete and there's nothing more they can do.
